sections.paragraph: ϰενός, ή, όν [IE assoc.; ‘empty’] ‘devoid of contents’, in NT metaph. in ref. to pers. or things: without anything, empty-handed Mk 12:3; Lk 1:53; 20:10f; without result, in vain, for nothing Ac 4:25; 1 Cor 15:10; 2 Cor 6:1; Gal 2:2; Phil 2:16; 1 Th 2:1 (in sense of being powerless); 3:5; without substance Eph 5:6; Col 2:8; of one majoring in self-glorying ignorance Js 2:20.
